query:
SELECT d.id, d.title, d.location, c.name as source_contact_name, c.buyer_type, c.company 
FROM deals d 
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON d.source_contact_id = c.id 
WHERE d.title LIKE '%South Crest%' OR d.title LIKE '%Stockbridge%' OR d.location LIKE '%Stockbridge%';
